_doc: Call boundary for the Stage 04 Search Planner wrapper runSearchPlanner().

call_shape.searchProfileBase: deterministic Search Profile base object (query_rows, base_templates, variant_guard_terms)

derived_context: queryHistory from searchProfileBase.base_templates (prior queries to avoid)
config_behaviors: hasLlmRouteApiKey(config, { role: 'plan' }) gates LLM vs deterministic fallback
resolvePhaseModel(config, 'searchPlanner') gates LLM vs deterministic fallback
config.llmTimeoutMs or config.openaiTimeoutMs is forwarded to the LLM call
